programmes.show_description: ... Last Breath: Mystery drama starring Taylor Cole. When a fatal car crash raises red flags, a determined TV reporter and a seasoned detective join forces to uncover the truth. (2019)
...Inheritance To Die For: Crime drama with Candace Cameron Bure. When a mysterious criminal taunts Aurora by leaving clues at crime scenes, she must win the final round before it's too late! (2019)

Psychological thriller with Morgan Bradley. A new mother's world unravels when she suspects someone is trying to steal her baby - is it real or a dangerous figment of her sleep-deprived mind? (2021)
Twisted mystery starring Megan Park. A grieving young woman is accused of the murder of both her parents. Can she and her friends prove her innocence in the disturbing case (2018)?

...Dead Over Heels: Murder hits close to home for librarian and crime buff Aurora when she gets involved in the death of a local detective. (2017)
Trojan Horst: Mary Shannon is a Deputy U.S. Marshal for the Federal Witness Security Program - the department responsible for the relocation and protection of state witnesses.
Reckoning: In the thrilling conclusion to this two-part story, the stakes are at an all-time high as Castle and the precinct race to stop Beckett becoming serial killer 3XK's next victim.
Mystery starring Jill Wagner. When a rising star receives a chilling death threat, a quick-thinking professor steps into the spotlight to uncover the truth. (2019)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
Mystery starring Jill Wagner. When a rising star receives a chilling death threat, a quick-thinking professor steps into the spotlight to uncover the truth. (2019)
Hard-Boiled Murder: Dr Sloan helps his old friend, Private Detective Joe Maddix, investigate an unsolved murder case from 1973.
Murder, Country Style: Dr Sloan investigates the murder of a country music star whose body is discovered moments before he is due to accept an award.
Murder A La Mode: Jessica travels to Paris to promote her new book. Is a fashion designer's murder linked to a tragic 'sweatshop' fire?
The Dream Team: Gossip spreads through Cabot Cove when developers announce plans for a new resort complex in the local area. Meanwhile, Jessica investigates a fatal car accident.
Dirty Bomb: Sue's exceptional ability to read people's lips exposes the prospect of a terrorist bomb plot.
The Wrong Stuff: When an astronaut is mysteriously killed during a simulated mission to Mars, Castle and Beckett spacesuit-up and investigate.
Trajectories: Carrie and Al investigate what appears to be a gang related shooting.
Who Shot Jay Arnstein?: Mary Shannon is a Deputy U.S. Marshal for the Federal Witness Security Program - the department responsible for the relocation and protection of state witnesses.
...Drink and Be Buried: Crime sequel starring Dylan Neal. Culinary whiz Harry is hired to work a summer gala, but soon finds himself caught up in a murder mystery. Also starring Brooke Burns. (2017)
